eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CHILD ABDUCTION EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Texas; at 5:13 AM on MAY 30, 2026 Effective until 8:13 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
Local AMBER Alert: Missing Possibly Abducted Child from Dickinson, TX. Suspect vehicle is a Brown 2012 Ford Explorer with TX license plate SVM5598. Missing child: Kiara Hseih, 6 year old white female unknown clothing description. Suspect is James Ramirez 36 year old white male. Call Harris County Sheriff's with information. If seen call 911. Missing child: Kiara Hseih, 6 year old white female unknown clothing description. Suspect is James Ramirez 36 year old white male. Call Harris County Sheriff's with information. If seen call 911..
